title: Eden Pre-primary & Aftercare excelling in shaping young minds
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Eden Pre-Primary & Aftercare, conveniently located at 26 Market Street in George, continues to shine as a trusted and dynamic Early Childhood Development Playschool and Aftercare Centre: proudly serving children aged 1 year to Grade R since 1996.


> The school’s excellence in early childhood education has earned it a coveted nomination in the Best of George 2025 Readers’ Choice Awards in the category of Best Crèche/Playschool/ Aftercare – a recognition that reflects the consistent trust and support from local families for decades.


Eden Pre-Primary provides more than just a solid educational foundation – it offers a full-day programs as prescribed by the Department of Social Development and Department of Basic Education that nurtures young minds through structured learning, guided play, and individual attention. From teaching essential life skills, to encouraging creativity through interactive activities and color exploration, the school ensures every child feels safe, supported, and inspired.

One of the standout features that sets Eden Pre-Primary apart is its comprehensive aftercare service, which includes safe and reliable transport from local primary schools directly to the Aftercare Centre. This service is a game-changer for working parents, as children are not only collected from school but are also transported to extracurricular activities as needed – all under the attentive care of qualified and trained staff.

Aftercare at Eden Pre-Primary goes beyond supervision. Children receive nutritious cooked lunches, enjoy supervised outdoor play, get help with homework, and even support with school projects – making it a holistic and enriching environment after school hours. School Holiday Programs is also offered to the public with supervised care, fun activities and two meals per day.

With flexible weekday operating hours and a warm, nurturing approach, Eden Pre-Primary & Aftercare offers unmatched convenience and peace of mind for busy families in George with all staff qualified and facilities registered by Department of Basic Education, Department of Social Development and Department of Health (facilities).

As the 2025 Readers’ Choice Awards approach, Eden PrePrimary’s nomination is a proud moment that honors the dedication of its passionate team. More than just a playschool, Eden Pre-Primary is a vibrant Early Childhood Centre where education, care, community, and fun come’s together – giving every child a place to learn, grow and play.

Voting in the Best of George awards gives the community a chance to acknowledge a centre that truly excels in shaping young minds.

Click here to vote: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/

Visit our website for more information: www.edenpreprimary.co.za

Photo supplied.

Photo supplied.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
